rect.style: fill: #3498DB; border: 1px solid #3498DB; font-size: 24px; font-weight: bold; text-align: center;

div.style: position: absolute; top: 60; left: 20; width: 380; height: 40; background-color: #f7f7f7; border: 1px solid #ccc; padding: 10px; border-radius: 5px;
div.p: The Transport Layer is the fourth layer of the OSI model and is responsible for reliable data transfer between devices on a network.

div.style: position: absolute; top: 110; left: 20; width: 380; height: 40; background-color: #f7f7f7; border: 1px solid #ccc; padding: 10px; border-radius: 5px;
div.p: Provides reliable data transfer between devices, ensures data is delivered in the correct order, detects and corrects errors, provides flow control and congestion control.

div.style: position: absolute; top: 170; left: 20; width: 380; height: 40; background-color: #f7f7f7; border: 1px solid #ccc; padding: 10px; border-radius: 5px;
div.p: Reliability, error detection, error correction, flow control, congestion control.

div.style: position: absolute; top: 230; left: 20; width: 380; height: 40; background-color: #f7f7f7; border: 1px solid #ccc; padding: 10px; border-radius: 5px;
position: absolute; top: 290; left: 20; width: 380; height: 40; background-color: #f7f7f7; border: 1px solid #ccc; padding: 10px; border-radius: 5px;
div.p: Connection-oriented protocol, ensures reliable data transfer.

rect.style: fill: #3498DB; border: 1px solid #3498DB; font-size: 24px; font-weight: bold; text-align: center;
